_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.4 (Milestone 2) the PlayerVsNpcCalc.distribution path (getAttackerDist + applyNpcTransforms + getDistribution + getMax) is now ported in addition to accuracy/defenceRoll/maxMeleeHit/maxRangedHit/maxMagicHit, so every maxHit row now asserts via getMax() (the distribution top = upstream's maxHit) — including the blisterwood row (55 via the vampyrebane scaleDamage(5,4)). For non-transform cases getMax() equals the old getMinAndMax().max(). dps/ttk (PlayerVsNpcCalc.dps) remain deferred to Milestone 3.
